sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_val Date32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_val) VALUES (1, YYYYMMDDToDate32(20230101));
UPDATE test_dates SET date_val = YYYYMMDDToDate32(20220202) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, date_val FROM test_dates WHERE date_val = YYYYMMDDToDate32(20230101);
SELECT id, date_val FROM test_dates WHERE date_val > YYYYMMDDToDate32(20220101) ORDER BY id;
